arts.ttl: Juventus eyeing Antonio Silva: Jorge Mendes a key ally in transfer strategy
arts.sum: Juventus are set to make moves in the transfer market following season-ending injuries to defenders Gleison Bremer and Juan Cabal. The Italian giants have turned their attention to Antonio Silva, a promising 20-year-old Portuguese center-back currently playing for Benfica. Cristiano Giuntoli, Juventus’ sporting director, is particularly impressed with Silva’s potential. Calciomercato report how Silva, known for his aerial prowess and marking ability, is considered one of the most exciting prospects in Portuguese football.
